title: campium neglectum
intro: Campium neglectum, also known as Mountain Campion, is a perennial plant species in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Campium neglectum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and even exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Campium neglectum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
